skills.name: Penetration Test Plan
skills.description: Design penetration testing plans with scope, methodology, tools, and reporting. Outputs test scenarios, OWASP Top 10 coverage, and remediation priorities.
skills.promptPreview: Design penetration testing plans with scope, methodology, tools, OWASP Top 10 coverage, and remediation priorities.

skills.name: Penetration Testing
skills.description: Design penetration testing plans with OWASP methodology, attack vectors, and remediation tracking. Outputs test scope, findings, and security improvements.
skills.promptPreview: Design penetration testing with OWASP methodology, attack vectors, remediation tracking, and security improvement findings.

skills.name: Security Audit
skills.description: Conduct security audits covering authentication, authorization, data protection, and compliance. Outputs findings, risk ratings, and remediation plans.
skills.promptPreview: Conduct security audits covering authentication, authorization, data protection, compliance with findings and remediation plans.

skills.name: Threat Modeling
skills.description: Design threat models using STRIDE, attack trees, and data flow diagrams. Outputs threat analysis, risk ratings, and mitigation strategies.
skills.promptPreview: Design systematic threat analysis with STRIDE methodology, attack trees, data flow diagrams, and prioritized mitigations.
